---
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-container}

::: {.hero-image}
![](images/roy.jpg){.profile-img}
:::

::: {.hero-content}

## Roy Mwavita

```{=html}

<div class="social-links">

<a href="https://github.com/roy-mwavita0"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer">
   <i class="fab fa-github"></i>
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/roy-mwavita-495b50220/"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer">
   <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i>
</a>

<a href="mailto:lennicroy@gmail.com">
   <i class="fas fa-envelope"></i>
</a>

</div>

```

#### Research Data Analyst • Monitoring & Evaluation Specialist
3+ experience in turning program data into actionable insights for public health, research and development programs.

### 🛠️ What I work with

<div class="badges">
  <span class="badge">R</span>
  <span class="badge">Shiny</span>
  <span class="badge">Quarto</span>
  <span class="badge">KoboToolbox</span>
  <span class="badge">ODK</span>
  <span class="badge">RedCap</span>
  <span class="badge">Python</span>
  <span class="badge">Power BI</span>
  <span class="badge">Excel</span>
  <span class="badge">SQL (basic)</span>
  <span class="badge">Data Quality Systems</span>
  <span class="badge">M&E Frameworks</span>
</div>


:::
:::

---

## Featured Areas

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}

### 🧩 Projects

Data systems, automation tools, and analytics solutions developed for health and development programs.

[Explore →](projects.qmd)

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}

### 📊 Dashboards

Interactive Shiny applications for program monitoring, data quality assessment, and performance tracking.

[Explore →](dashboards.qmd)

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.feature-card}

### 📘 R Toolkit Digest

Practical R programming tutorials focused on real-world MEAL and analytics workflows.

[Explore →](digest.qmd)

:::
:::

:::


---

## CV
<div class="hero-buttons">

[Download CV](files/CV_Roy%20Mwavita.pdf){.btn .btn-secondary target="_blank"}

</div>
